metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5172
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4: immunogold EM imaging of rat brain slices showed TRPV1 mostly but not exclusively in the post-synaptic spines and this finding was in agreement with the staining of dendrites seen on the confocal images. TRPV1 was also localized to astrocytes and pericytes.

Based on the known transmembrane topology of this protein, "integral component of ... membrane" term was selected.. Experimental description: M&M: "Pre-embedding immunoelectronmicroscopy
The preparation of the rat brain slices and immunohistochemistry were performed as described above except that 50 μm thick slices were used."

antibody @ Figure 4 legend:
anti-TRPV1 antibody (Chemicon, affinity purified, rabbit, dilution 1:100)
